# Haven & Harbor Counseling

> Trauma-informed, faith-friendly counseling and therapy in Austin, Texas — for individuals navigating trauma, anxiety, grief, and life transitions.

Haven & Harbor Counseling is an Austin-based private practice offering evidence-based individual therapy (EMDR, IFS, somatic work) with optional Christian/faith integration. In-person and telehealth across Texas.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Practice overview and how to begin.
- [About](/about): Who we are and our values.
- [Our Approach](/approach): How therapy works at Haven & Harbor.
- [Services](/services): Trauma, anxiety, grief, and Christian counseling.
- [Christian Counseling](/christian-counseling): Faith-integrated therapy.
- [FAQ](/faq): Common questions about fees, insurance, and first sessions.
- [Contact](/contact): Reach the practice.
- [Schedule](/schedule): Book a free consult and access intake forms.

## Resources

- [Resources](/resources): Articles and guides on trauma and healing.
- [What is EMDR?](/what-is-emdr): Plain-language explanation of EMDR therapy.
- [What is IFS Therapy?](/what-is-ifs-therapy): Internal Family Systems overview.
- [Cost of Therapy in Austin](/cost-of-therapy-austin): Fees, insurance, and out-of-pocket guidance.
- [Your First Therapy Session](/first-therapy-session): What to expect.
- [Signs of Complex Trauma](/resources/signs-of-complex-trauma)
- [Christian Counseling vs Secular Therapy](/resources/christian-counseling-vs-secular-therapy)
- [Trauma and Sleep](/resources/trauma-and-sleep)
- [How to Know If You Need Therapy](/resources/how-to-know-if-you-need-therapy)
